messages.content:
You are provided with function signatures within <tools></tools> XML tags. Here are the available tools: <tools> {"type": "function", "function": {"name": "analyze_resource", "description": "analyze_resource.

Returns a dictionary shaped to align with `CustomAgentOutput`  fields to make it easy for the model to adopt as the final output when appropriate.

    Args:
        id(Union[]): Unique resource identifier (string)        tags(dict[str, str]): Flat key/value tags used for basic classification        properties(dict[str, Union[]]): Arbitrary properties describing the resource        attributes(dict[str, Union[]]): Attributes used for scoring and compliance checks", "parameters": {"description": "Generic resource description used by tools.

Extend or replace this model in your domain as needed. Keeping a typed
schema improves tool discoverability and validation.", "properties": {"id": {"default": null, "description": "Unique resource identifier (string)", "examples": ["asset-123", "vm-42"], "anyOf": [{"type": "string"}, {"type": "null"}]}, "tags": {"additionalProperties": {"type": "string"}, "description": "Flat key/value tags used for basic classification", "examples": [{"environment": "production", "service-type": "web"}], "type": "object"}, "properties": {"type": "object", "additionalProperties": true, "description": "Arbitrary properties describing the resource", "examples": [["is_serverless", true], ["owner", "team-a"]]}, "attributes": {"additionalProperties": true, "description": "Attributes used for scoring and compliance checks", "examples": [["encryption_enabled", true], ["public_access", false]], "type": "object"}}, "type": "object", "additionalProperties": false}} {"type": "function", "function": {"name": "final_result", "description": "final_result(resource_id: str, status: str, summary: str, confidence: Union[], notes: Union[], metadata: Union[]) - Simplified agent output compatible with vLLM schema constraints.

Uses flat structure to avoid $defs references that vLLM doesn't support.

    Args:
        resource_id(str): The unique identifier of the analyzed resource        status(str): The determined status (e.g., "processed", "failed")        summary(str): A brief summary of the analysis        confidence(Union[]): Confidence score (0.0-1.0)        notes(Union[]): Additional notes or details        metadata(Union[]): Additional metadata", "parameters": {"properties": {"resource_id": {"description": "The unique identifier of the analyzed resource", "type": "string"}, "status": {"description": "The determined status (e.g., "processed", "failed")", "type": "string"}, "summary": {"description": "A brief summary of the analysis", "type": "string"}, "confidence": {"default": null, "description": "Confidence score (0.0-1.0)", "anyOf": [{"maximum": 1.0, "minimum": 0.0, "type": "number"}, {"type": "null"}]}, "notes": {"default": null, "description": "Additional notes or details", "anyOf": [{"type": "string"}, {"type": "null"}]}, "metadata": {"default": null, "description": "Additional metadata", "anyOf": [{"additionalProperties": true, "type": "object"}, {"type": "null"}]}}, "required": ["resource_id", "status", "summary"], "type": "object", "additionalProperties": false}} </tools>
Analyze the situation and provide a recommendation.
Analyze the situation and provide a recommendation.

parameters.description:
Generic resource description used by tools.

Extend or replace this model in your domain as needed. Keeping a typed
schema improves tool discoverability and validation.

tags.description: Flat key/value tags used for basic classification

attributes.description: Attributes used for scoring and compliance checks

resource_id.description: The unique identifier of the analyzed resource

summary.description: A brief summary of the analysis
